tasks.name: Create type-safe column definitions for presentation table
tasks.purpose: Define TanStack Table columns with sorting configuration for Title, Presentation Type, and Last Updated
tasks.input_state: DataTable component exists with sorting support, building_blocks_submissions table has id, title, presentation_type, updated_at columns
tasks.output_state: table-column-definitions.ts file exports PresentationColumn interface and columns array with sorting enabled for Title, Type, Updated columns
tasks.acceptance_criterion: table-column-definitions.ts exists and exports columns array with ColumnDef<PresentationRow>[] type

tasks.name: Create presentation type filter dropdown component
tasks.purpose: Add Select component for filtering presentations by type (All, Informative, Persuasive, Inspirational)

constraints: Support All option to clear filter

tasks.input_state: Select component available from @kit/ui, presentation_type column contains Informative, Persuasive, Inspirational values
tasks.output_state: PresentationTypeFilter component with Select dropdown, options for All + presentation types, onChange callback for filter value
tasks.acceptance_criterion: PresentationTypeFilter component exists and renders Select with All, Informative, Persuasive, Inspirational options

tasks.name: Create client-side filtering function for presentations
tasks.purpose: Implement filter logic that filters presentations array by presentation_type when filter is active

constraints: Return all presentations when filter is All or null

tasks.input_state: PresentationTypeFilter component provides filter value, presentations array available from parent
tasks.output_state: filterPresentationsByType function that accepts presentations array and filter value, returns filtered array
tasks.acceptance_criterion: filterPresentationsByType function correctly filters by type and returns all presentations for All selection

tasks.name: Add sorting state management to presentation table widget
tasks.purpose: Integrate TanStack Table sorting state with DataTable onSortingChange callback and set default sort

dependencies: useState from React for sorting state
manualSorting prop set to false for client-side sorting

tasks.input_state: PresentationTableWidget component exists, DataTable component with sorting support, column definitions with sortable columns
tasks.output_state: PresentationTableWidget has sorting state initialized to { id: 'updated_at', desc: true }, sorting state passed to DataTable
tasks.acceptance_criterion: PresentationTableWidget initializes sorting state and passes it to DataTable onSortingChange prop

tasks.name: Add filtering state to presentation table widget
tasks.purpose: Add filter state management to PresentationTableWidget and connect filter dropdown

constraints: Initialize filter to null or All
Apply filter to presentations before passing to DataTable

tasks.input_state: PresentationTableWidget exists, PresentationTypeFilter component ready with onChange callback
tasks.output_state: PresentationTableWidget has filter state, renders PresentationTypeFilter above table, applies filter to presentations array
tasks.acceptance_criterion: PresentationTableWidget renders filter dropdown, applies filter to presentations, passes filtered data to DataTable

tasks.name: Configure pagination in presentation table widget
tasks.purpose: Set up DataTable pagination with pageSize of 10, calculate pageCount, handle page changes

constraints: Calculate pageCount from filtered presentations length

tasks.input_state: PresentationTableWidget has filtered presentations array, DataTable supports pagination props
tasks.output_state: PresentationTableWidget passes pageIndex=0, pageSize=10, pageCount to DataTable, handles page navigation
tasks.acceptance_criterion: PresentationTableWidget passes pagination props to DataTable with pageSize=10

tasks.name: Verify sort indicators display correctly on column headers
tasks.purpose: Confirm sort arrows appear on sorted column and toggle direction on click

dependencies: DataTable sorting UI with ChevronUp/ChevronDown icons
constraints: Sort indicator visible on currently sorted column
Arrow color changes based on sort direction

tasks.input_state: PresentationTableWidget has sorting state, DataTable renders sort indicators on sortable headers
tasks.output_state: Sort indicators render correctly on Title, Type, Updated columns, clicking toggles sort direction
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Sort arrows appear on sorted column header with correct color (foreground when active, muted otherwise)
